alerts.title: Iran-Oman joint administration of Strait of Hormuz escalates amid nuclear breakout window
alerts.summary: ME Spectator (53.7K views) reports Iran and Oman released joint statement confirming intention to establish joint administration over Strait of Hormuz with maritime service fees. Development coincides with global_metrics confirming 60% U-235 enrichment and ~1-2 week breakout window, creating dual escalation in strategic chokepoint control and nuclear threshold (telegram, global_metrics).

alerts.title: Trump suggests ambiguity over Iran school strike accountability amid ongoing talks
alerts.summary: Multiple incidents sources (NBC News, Reuters, The Times) report Trump stating it may never be known who bombed girls' school in Iran, with Netanyahu claiming he informed but did not seek Trump permission before strike. Uncertainty over attribution reflects tensions between Israeli unilateral action and US negotiation framework with Iran (incidents).

alerts.title: Pakistan PM claims Iran agrees to future ballistic missile program negotiations
alerts.summary: ME Spectator reports (~46K views) Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif claims in shocking statement that Iran has agreed to hold negotiations on its ballistic missile program in future. Development suggests potential Iranian concession on previously non-negotiable issue, though without direct Iranian confirmation (telegram).

alerts.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon and Beirut suburbs persist despite ceasefire talks
alerts.summary: Multiple incidents sources (Al Jazeera, BBC, NBC News, Axios) confirm Israeli strikes killed 2-3 in southern Lebanon and Beirut suburbs after renewed Hezbollah attacks, with operations continuing despite Washington negotiations and Senate constraints. Pattern indicates unilateral Israeli escalation outside formal ceasefire framework (incidents).

alerts.title: Trump administration tensions over Iran dominate US news cycle amid policy constraints
alerts.summary: Sentiment data shows US negative sentiment at 51% with 'Trump' (68 mentions), 'Iran' (24), and 'war' (17) dominating word cloud. Senate War Powers vote (50-48) with four GOP defections signals domestic political fracturing over Iran military authority, reflecting deepening constraints on presidential escalation (sentiment, incidents).

analysis_note: Strategic moment characterized by compressed nuclear timeline (1-2 weeks to breakout), contested Strait of Hormuz control, Israeli unilateral escalation outside negotiations, and domestic US political constraints on Iran war powers—creating multiple vectors of imminent escalation risk.
